session_capture_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual session_capture_config_t(3)

NAME

session_capture_config_t - Configuration for session capture context.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/common/session/capture.h>

Data Fields


media_source_type_t type
Media source type (WEBCAM, FILE, STDIN, TEST). const char * path
Device index (for webcam) or file path (for file sources). uint32_t target_fps
Target frame rate in FPS (e.g., 60 for display, 144 for network). bool loop
Enable loop playback for file sources. bool resize_for_network
Resize frames to network-optimal dimensions (MAX_FRAME_WIDTH x MAX_FRAME_HEIGHT). bool enable_audio
Enable audio capture from media source. bool audio_fallback_to_mic
Fall back to microphone if file audio is not available. void * mic_audio_ctx
Microphone audio context for fallback (borrowed, not owned). double initial_seek_timestamp
Seek to this timestamp after opening media (0.0 = no seek). session_capture_should_exit_fn should_exit_callback
Optional: callback to check if initialization should be cancelled (e.g., shutdown signal). void * callback_data
Opaque data passed to should_exit_callback.

Detailed Description

Configuration for session capture context.

Specifies the media source type, path, and capture parameters.

Definition at line 80 of file common/session/capture.h.

Field Documentation

bool session_capture_config_t::audio_fallback_to_mic

Fall back to microphone if file audio is not available.
